---
title: Barotropic and Baroclinic Eddy Feedbacks in the Midlatitude Jet Variability
  and Responses to Climate Change–Like Thermal Forcings
pagetitle: 2017-1-1-Burrows2015 - Gang Chen
body-classes: publication-page
format:
  html:
    title-block-style: none
year: 2017
author: D Alex Burrows, Gang Chen and Lantao Sun
venue: Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences
venue_cit: <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 74, 111--132, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-16-0047.1.
recommended_citation: 'D Alex Burrows, Gang Chen and Lantao Sun, 2017: Barotropic
  and Baroclinic Eddy Feedbacks in the Midlatitude Jet Variability and Responses to
  Climate Change–Like Thermal Forcings, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>,
  74, 111--132, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-16-0047.1.'
paper_url: http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/10.1175/JAS-D-16-0047.1
---

::: {.page-with-sidebar}

::: {.sidebar-col}
{{< include /_author-profile.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-col}

# Barotropic and Baroclinic Eddy Feedbacks in the Midlatitude Jet Variability and Responses to Climate Change–Like Thermal Forcings

*Published in Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences, 2017*

**Recommended citation:** D Alex Burrows, Gang Chen and Lantao Sun, 2017: Barotropic and Baroclinic Eddy Feedbacks in the Midlatitude Jet Variability and Responses to Climate Change–Like Thermal Forcings, <i>Journal of the Atmospheric Sciences</i>, 74, 111--132, doi:10.1175/JAS-D-16-0047.1.

[Download paper](http://journals.ametsoc.org/doi/10.1175/JAS-D-16-0047.1){target="_blank"}

:::

:::
